headline: Transcript: Introducing Working It — How to survive the office Christmas party
summary: Isabel Berwick speaks to author and comedian Viv Groskop and FT columnists Stephen Bush and Emma Jacobs
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Working It podcast episode: ‘How to survive the office Christmas party’

Lucy Fisher:Hello. It’s Lucy Fisher here. Political Fix is taking a break over Christmas. But we didn’t want to leave our listeners bereft, so I’m taking the opportunity to introduce another podcast from our FT stable. It’s called Working It, a show about workplace issues. And the episode that follows might just turn out to be handy at this particular time of year. It’s essential listening if, like me, you’ve been swept up in a whirlwind of Christmas parties in the run-up to the holidays. So sit back and enjoy as Political Fix regular Stephen Bush reveals his own Westminster Christmas party faux pas and offers tips on saving face. Political Fix will be back next week with a special look ahead to what’s in store throughout 2024.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Isabel Berwick:Hello and welcome to Working It from the Financial Times. I’m Isabel Berwick. It’s the office Christmas party. You’re fee
